name: Comprehensive test coverage for all modules

description:
Add comprehensive tests: 890→1027 tests (+137), coverage avg ~96%
- Plan-mode: 97.66%→98.44% stmts, 349→361 tests
- Sandbox: 94.27%→98.09% stmts, 396→450 tests  
- Subagent: 67.85%→96.61% stmts, 88→159 tests
- Zip-repo: 100% unchanged, 57 tests

asi.hypothesis: Parallel subagent approach for test creation across 3 modules

description:
Round 2: further coverage improvements
- Subagent: 96.61%→99.06% stmts, 86.52%→92.81% branches, 159→222 tests
- Sandbox: 98.09% stmts, 91.82%→95.33% branches, 450→463 tests
- Total: 1027→1103 tests (+76), avg coverage ~98%

asi.hypothesis: Second round focused on branch coverage gaps

description:
Round 3: targeted branch coverage for subagent (99.43% stmts, 93.41% branches)
- Subagent: 99.06%→99.43% stmts, 222→230 tests
- Sandbox: 98.09% unchanged (lines 115, 383-384 are dead code by design)
- Total: 1103→1111 tests
- Identified 3 lines of dead code in sandbox/index.ts (defensive but unreachable)

asi.hypothesis: Target remaining uncovered lines with precise branch tests
asi.sandbox_383_384: dead code - MODE_RANK[read_only]=0 > MODE_RANK[any] is always false
asi.sandbox_115: dead code - buildCurrentPolicy yolo case unreachable from Case 4

description:
Round 4: attempted line 265 branch coverage, confirmed natural ceiling
- Added 2 tests (1111→1113), all pass
- Line 265 branches require diverse events through wait_agent tool path — architectural limitation
- Confirmed remaining gaps are dead code (sandbox) or require overfitting
- Natural ceiling reached at ~98% avg statement coverage

asi.hypothesis: Cover remaining index.ts line 265 branches via wait_agent tool handler
asi.result: Branches on line 265 cannot be covered without forcing events through the wait_agent path. Events are filtered by agentPath (ROOT_PATH) but child agent events have child agentPath. Architectural limitation of the test infrastructure.
asi.line_265_branches: 6 uncovered branches in a single complex expression formatting events for wait_agent tool output. Requires status_changed + final_message + other events to pass through the tool handler. Mock infrastructure doesn't support this easily.
asi.line_349: String(err) branch requires non-Error throw from close(), which requires artificial mocking

description:
Round 5: cover macSeatbelt catch path branches (output limit + timeout overlap)
- Added 1 integration test (1113→1114), all pass
- macSeatbelt.ts branches: 93.13%→95.09% (lines 355, 418 covered)
- Sandbox module: 98.09%→98.3% stmts, 95.33%→96.1% branches
- Average statement coverage: ~98%→99%

asi.hypothesis: Cover macSeatbelt.ts catch path with outputExceeded=true by combining output limit + timeout
asi.branches_covered: Lines 355 (requestTerminate early return) and 418 (outputExceeded ternary in catch) now covered
asi.how: Test uses 'echo hello; sleep 30' with maxOutputBytes=2 and timeoutMs=100 — output limit fires first, then timeout rejects before process closes, reaching catch with outputExceeded=true
asi.remaining_gaps: Lines 123 (cross-volume relative path), 275-289 (waitForProcessDeath), 332 (keepBytes>0 false — dead code by design), 410 (waitForProcessDeath in catch)

description:
Round 6: plan-mode utils.ts mkdir branch + fallback documentation
- Added 2 tests (1114→1116), all pass
- plan-mode: utils.ts 100% branch coverage (mkdir path)
- plan-mode: index.ts 98.42% stmts, 95.41% branches (lines 131-132 confirmed unreachable)
- Average statement coverage: 99.04%→99.14%

asi.hypothesis: Cover plan-mode utils.ts mkdir branch + document unreachable fallback
asi.utils_ts_branch: utils.ts now 100% branch coverage (mkdir path tested with non-existent dir)
asi.index_ts_131_132: Confirmed structurally unreachable - enterPlanMode always sets mainRef === savedMainModel, so sameModelRef returns true and fallback never entered
asi.test_added: saveModelConfig mkdir test + fallback documentation test

description:
Round 7: registry unsubscribe branch + render dead code documentation
- Added 1 test (1116→1117), all pass
- registry.ts: 96%→98% branches (unsubscribe idempotent path)
- Documented: render.ts else-if dead code, agentControl.ts callerPath dead code
- subagent module: 93.41%→93.71% branches

asi.hypothesis: Cover registry.ts unsubscribe-idempotent branch + document render.ts dead code
asi.registry_ts: unsubscribe called twice covers branch #0-1 (idx < 0), 96%→98% branches
asi.render_ts: else-if false branch on line 57 confirmed dead code — filter guarantees only status_changed/final_message
asi.callerPath_branches: agentControl.ts 8 uncovered branches all require callerPath !== ROOT_PATH, but resolveCallerPath always returns ROOT_PATH — dead code for future subagent-calling-subagent feature
